_comment: Sample Messari AI / research response (defensive-parse fixture for research_context).

messages.content: Agent-permissioning / intent-vs-execution control planes are attracting top crypto funds (e.g. Polychain, Archetype) at seed in 2026. The strongest open risk is defensibility: incumbent wallets and frontier model providers can ship native guardrails, so a standalone policy layer must prove neutral, cross-wallet adoption rather than a single-integration demo.
